key_themes: Strong revenue/EBITDA beats with organic + acquisitive growth
Ongoing share buyback programme signalling confidence
High recurring SaaS revenue (81%), AI/cloud focus, substantial net cash
summary: AdvancedAdvT delivered robust FY26 trading results well ahead of expectations (revenue ~£53m vs prior £43.3m; adj. EBITDA ≥£14.4m vs £13.7m consensus) following strong H1 2025 growth (revenue +28%, organic contribution, adj. EBITDA +76%) and acquisitions. The company is aggressively buying back shares, holds ~£97m cash with minimal debt, and benefits from 81% recurring revenue in SaaS/AI-focused software solutions; analysts maintain a Strong Buy with a 235p target (vs ~170p current). Biggest risk is sustaining organic growth and integration success in competitive public/private sector software markets after resolving the M&C Saatchi situation without a full takeover.[[1]](https://markets.ft.com/data/announce/detail?dockey=1323-17475231-490VTEJ14P59FBNR63OGEHEMFH)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ADVT.L/)[[3]](https://s203.q4cdn.com/422969874/files/doc_financials/2026/q2/FY-26_ADVT_Final-Interim.pdf)

recent_posts.highlight: Full year trading ahead of market expectations with revenue ~£53m and adj. EBITDA ≥£14.4m, citing strong H2 performance.
Repeated 'Purchase of Own Shares' announcements continuing the buyback programme launched in March.
Strong Buy rating from covering analysts; 235p target implies ~38% upside from 170p level.
Very limited relevant investor or trader discussion; searches primarily returned unrelated recruitment or advertising posts.
